# Customer Brief: FreelanceFlow — SaaS Invoicing Platform

## Overview
Build a modern SaaS invoicing platform for freelancers and small agencies. The platform should allow users to create, send, and track invoices, manage clients, and handle recurring billing.

## Key Requirements
- User registration and authentication (email + Google OAuth)
- Client management (CRUD, contact details, payment terms)
- Invoice creation with line items, taxes, discounts
- Multiple currency support
- Recurring invoice scheduling
- Payment tracking (mark as paid, partial payments)
- PDF invoice generation with customizable templates
- Email delivery of invoices
- Dashboard with revenue analytics and outstanding amounts
- Mobile-responsive web interface

## Target Users
- Freelancers (designers, developers, writers)
- Small agencies (2-10 people)
- Consultants

## Constraints
- Must be GDPR compliant (EU users)
- Must support WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility
- Target: 10,000 concurrent users at launch
- Budget: Mid-range startup budget
- Timeline: MVP in 3 months

## Technical Preferences
- Modern web stack (React/Next.js preferred)
- Cloud-native deployment
- PostgreSQL for data storage
